content: You are a helpful assistant. When a PDF is shared, answer questions based on its content.

PDF context:


[Page 1]
Nature-Inspired Elegance
BEST FIRE by American Gas Log, premium gas logs truly have more to offer
combining luxury and quality with technological design achievements.  Intricately
detailed logs are each hand-painted with natural bark patterns reflecting the rugged
distinction and variety of natural logs.  Our Ever-glo ember bed enhancement system
provides glowing embers at the heart of the fire for a brilliant flame.  Best Fire’s clean-
burning burner system allows you to enjoy a beautiful fire for only pennies an hour.
The convenience of our gas logs means no ashes, no sparks, and virtually no air
pollution.  Whether your logs are burning or not, they provide genuine fireplace
elegance inspired by nature all year long. 
VENTED
All BEST FIRE log sets include grate, burner, sand, embers,
lava rock and fittings. Limited Lifetime Warranty on logs.
Manufactured in U.S.A.
BONFIRE BLAZE
STADIUM SERIES – 3 TIERED
www.americangaslog.com
[Page 2]
' • '
AMERICAN GAS LOG'S vented gas lo---AZE
STADIUM SERIES – 3 TIERED
www.americangaslog.com
[Page 2]
' • '
AMERICAN GAS LOG'S vented gas log accessories are available to 
enhance the look and use of your gas logs, providing the ultimate in fireplace 
comfort and convenience. The remote control system and optional hard­
wired wall switch provide convenience in turning your gas logs on and off and 
in controlling flame height. Crackling ash, when placed in a decorative pine 
cone or split decorative log, provides long-lasting realistic crackling sound. 
A decorative front grate adds distinctive style to the fireplace front. Other 
accessories to customize the look of your gas logs include decorative acorns, 
pine cones, additional logs, platinum embers, lava rock and wood chips. 
Other features include: 
• Easy and safe to operate.
• Ever-glo Ember Bed Enhancement
System provides brilliant flame.
• Utilizes natural or LP gas.
• Custom sizes available.
• See-through kits available.
• Limited Lifetime Warranty on logs.
• Standa--- Custom sizes available.
• See-through kits available.
• Limited Lifetime Warranty on logs.
• Standard models available in sizes
18111 24111 30". Refer to measurement
chart below to determine model size.

Valve Cover

Remote Valve Cover

www.american gaslog.com

Answer ONLY using the context above: what is american gas log
If not in context, state it is missing.

American Gas Log is a manufacturer of premium gas logs, offering products such as the Stadium Series - 3 Tiered, and providing accessories to enhance the look and use of their gas logs. They are based in the U.S.A. and can be contacted at 5964 Peachtree Corners East, Suite G, Norcross, GA 30071, or through their website at www.americangaslog.com. Their products include vented gas logs, remote control systems, and various decorative accessories.
